description: Reconcile the August 2024 bank statement using the data in /home/ga/Desktop/bank_statement_august.txt within the Odoo environment (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo). The reconciliation must include matching transactions for Alpine Ridge Consulting, Coastal Bay Solutions, Summit Supply Co, and Pacific Materials Inc, recording a $35.00 service fee to an expense account, and validating the completed statement.
